config.title: xcsh
config.defaultNamespace.description: 新资源的默认命名空间
config.confirmDelete.description: 删除资源前显示确认对话框
config.deleteConfirmationLevel.descripti: 根据操作危险程度决定何时显示删除确认
config.deleteConfirmationLevel.always: 所有删除操作均显示确认对话框
config.deleteConfirmationLevel.highOnly: 仅对高危删除操作显示确认
config.deleteConfirmationLevel.never: 从不显示确认对话框（请谨慎使用）
config.autoRefreshInterval.description: 自动刷新间隔（秒），设为 0 可禁用
config.viewMode.description: 资源显示模式：'console' 显示类似 F5 控制台的简洁输出，'full' 显示完整的 API 响应
config.showPreviewApis.description: 在浏览器中显示预览/测试版 API。预览 API 将带有标识角标。
config.xcsh.enabled.description: 启用 xcsh Shell 助手集成
config.xcsh.path.description: xcsh 可执行文件的自定义路径。留空则自动检测。
config.xcsh.chatParticipant.description: 将 @xcsh 注册为 Copilot Chat 参与者
config.xcsh.languageModel.description: 将 xcsh 注册为 VS Code 语言模型提供程序
config.xcsh.autoStart.description: 在扩展激活时自动启动 xcsh 进程
config.xcsh.defaultModel.description: xcsh 会话使用的默认 AI 模型
config.xcsh.thinkingLevel.description: xcsh AI 响应的思考深度级别
config.xcsh.panelMode.description: xcsh 面板体验：富文本 Webview 或经典 CLI 终端
config.xcsh.panelMode.terminal: 经典 CLI 终端体验

chat.xcsh.description: Ask about F5 Distributed Cloud resources, configuration, and troubleshooting via xcsh
chat.xcsh.command.status: Show xcsh integration health and connection status
chat.xcsh.command.context: Show active xcsh context details (tenant, namespace, API URL)
chat.xcsh.command.resources: List resources in the current namespace
chat.xcsh.disambiguation.networking: Questions about F5 Distributed Cloud networking, load balancers, origin pools, routes, DNS, CDN, virtual hosts, and HTTP load balancer configuration
chat.xcsh.disambiguation.security: Questions about F5 Distributed Cloud security, WAF policies, service policies, DDoS protection, bot defense, API security, and application firewall configuration
chat.xcsh.disambiguation.infrastructure: Questions about F5 Distributed Cloud sites, site health, cloud connectors, network connectors, fleet management, and infrastructure status
